title: Maximum Strength Of K Disjoint Subarrays
description: Choose exactly k nonempty disjoint subarrays in order and maximize their alternating weighted sum with coefficients k,-(k-1),...,1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int], k: int. 1 <= n <= 10000; k is positive odd and k<=n; n*k<=1000000; values fit signed 32-bit.
output_contract: Return long using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
